description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of tan and reddish-brown brickwork, with large windows and a prominent arched window at the front. The property is surrounded by a low brick and metal fence, and includes a detached garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped yard with trees, shrubs, and a hot tub. The backyard area is partially enclosed with tall hedges and contains outdoor seating and a small patio. The house has a balcony on the upper floor, and the main entrance is marked by a decorative gate and potted plants.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched window, decorative gate, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with tall hedges, hot tub, outdoor seating, and upper balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, dense tree coverage, and the back of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the arched window, main gate, and potted plants flanking the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched window and scattered rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a decorative metal gate, arched window above the door, potted plants, and a small paved approach without steps or porch.
